authority: brief §3/§4 (CL-W4 + the CL-W5 keystone; the carrier classifier over FX-W-E/F) + §10.5 RATIFIED 2026-06-14 (Will: additive-failure [ANALYTIC], Möbius-respects-quotient [MEASURED]; ℙ¹ raw (num,den) + cross-multiply referee) + Stage A DEMONSTRATED (CL-W1/W2/W3) + standing rules 1.8/1.9 + the manifest SPINE FENCE

depends_on.note: carrier.py (+ the rest) pinned inside the frozen manifest; enforced by require_frozen (rule 1.9). Stage A is DEMONSTRATED.

predictions.PMB.1: free-module additive reconstruction (CL-W4, [ANALYTIC]+confirm): on every FX-W-E carrier (ℚ, ℚⁿ, ℚⁿˣᵐ) the carrier classifier reports 'free_module' and additive reconstruction v ⊕_add ρ == TRUE closes — the residue ρ = TRUE − v lives in the module (same shape as the carrier) and the reconstruction recovers the pinned exact-ℚ TRUE (the independent truth, off the residue path), with ZERO failures across carrier shapes. The construction T,v in M => T-v in M is recorded (retired by proof); the battery confirms uniformly. K-W3 armed: any free-module carrier that fails additive is a refute-row. Units: (carrier, sample).
predictions.PMB.2: the quotient edge — KEYSTONE (CL-W5): on ℙ¹(ℚ) (FX-W-F) the carrier classifier reports 'quotient'. Additive reconstruction is ILL-DEFINED — the additive residue between two representatives of the same projective point DIFFERS while cross-multiply (a·d == b·c) certifies the representatives equal; this additive-failure half is graded [ANALYTIC] (foregone on ℙ¹, §10.5). The [MEASURED] weight: the PGL₂/Möbius action maps EQUAL points to EQUAL points — for every representative pair (r_i, r_j) of the point, p1_equal(M·r_i, M·r_j) — and moves the point non-trivially (M·r != r), so Möbius reconstructs where addition cannot. Hence ⊕ is additive IFF the carrier is a free ℚ-module: the family edge is LOCATED (a boundary, not a pass). K-W3 armed (refute-row-and-continue): if the additive residue is representative-INDEPENDENT on ℙ¹ (⊕ descends → the boundary is wrong) OR Möbius maps equal points to UNEQUAL — preserve the witness, name what reconstructs, reduce scope, CONTINUE; a named-boundary refutation is a result. Units: (representative pairs, Möbius action).
predictions.PMB.3: determinism: battery byte-stable x2 (sha256 over records).

probe: the carrier classifier (carrier.py, Stage-0-pinned): free_module vs quotient; free_module_reconstruct (additive); p1_equal (cross-multiply equality, the referee's equality); mobius (the PGL₂ action); additive_residue (the representative-dependent quantity). role=probe; the ℙ¹ carrier consults the L1 projective_ratio primitive (Rule 1.2).
referee: exact-ℚ: the pinned carrier TRUE (off the residue path) for the free-module closure; cross-multiply (a·d==b·c) for ℙ¹ equality. No external executed instrument (Axiom 10).
spine_fence_ack: this stage MEASURES the ⊕-carrier on named fixtures; NO spine claim, NO cross-domain G-claim (manifest SPINE FENCE, verbatim law). [INFERENCE] stays [INFERENCE].
status_move_rules: CL-W4 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PMB.1 PASS ([ANALYTIC]+confirm). CL-W5 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PMB.2 PASS (additive-failure [ANALYTIC]; Möbius-respects-quotient [MEASURED]; the family edge LOCATED). **K-W3 (refute-row-and-continue)** fires on any free-module additive failure OR any ℙ¹ additive-descent / Möbius quotient-break: the row -> REFUTED-WITH-NAMED-BOUNDARY, preserve the chain, reduce scope, CONTINUE; route to Will. Every FAIL/refute: STOP, present; NO status move applied in-campaign.
